1._: Tessavar stands at the long trestle table, one hand flattening a corner of the maps spread across its scarred surface, her eyes tracing routes she already half-knows. She has not eaten from the pot at the hearth and is not sure she will — Maret Coll's gaze has landed on her twice already, measuring, and Tessavar holds still under it the way she holds still on uncertain ground.

content._: tessavar's account at Thousand Valleys, beat by beat.
